title: A photo on my desk
summary: Describe one specific photo that sits on your desk.
prompt: Write 6–8 short sentences about one photo on your desk. Describe who or what is in it, when it was taken, and how it makes you feel. Use present simple and simple adjectives.
hintStarters: On my desk, there is a photo of…
In the photo, I can see…
Every time I look at it, I feel…
sampleText: On my desk in my flat in Lisbon, there is a small photo in a wooden frame. In the photo, I can see my sister and me. We stand on a beach in the south of Portugal. It is a sunny day. The sky is very blue and the sea is behind us. My sister wears a red dress and I wear a white shirt. We both smile at the camera. My father took this photo three years ago. At that time, we were on a family holiday. I love this photo because my sister lives in another city now. I do not see her very often. Every morning, I look at the photo when I sit at my desk. It makes me feel happy and a little sad at the same time. The wooden frame is small, but the memory is very big. I always keep this photo close to me.

sampleAnnotations.phrase: In the photo, I can see
sampleAnnotations.meaningVi: Trong ảnh, tôi có thể thấy

sampleAnnotations.phrase: keep this photo close to me
sampleAnnotations.meaningVi: giữ tấm ảnh này gần bên

sampleGrammarNotes.title: There is / There are
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyVi: Dùng 'there is' với danh từ số ít: 'there is a small photo'. Dùng 'there are' với danh từ số nhiều.
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: Use 'there is' with a singular noun, as in 'there is a small photo in a wooden frame'.

sampleGrammarNotes.title: Past simple for a specific past event
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyVi: Dùng quá khứ đơn cho sự kiện cụ thể đã xảy ra: 'My father took this photo three years ago.'
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: Use the past simple for a completed event in the past, as in 'My father took this photo three years ago'.

sampleTranslationVi: Trên bàn làm việc trong căn hộ của tôi ở Lisbon, có một tấm ảnh nhỏ trong khung gỗ. Trong ảnh, tôi thấy chị gái và tôi. Chúng tôi đứng trên một bãi biển ở miền nam Bồ Đào Nha. Đó là một ngày nắng. Bầu trời rất xanh và biển ở phía sau chúng tôi. Chị gái mặc váy đỏ còn tôi mặc áo trắng. Cả hai chúng tôi đều cười trước ống kính. Bố tôi chụp tấm ảnh này ba năm trước. Lúc đó chúng tôi đang đi nghỉ cùng gia đình. Tôi yêu tấm ảnh này vì chị gái bây giờ sống ở một thành phố khác. Tôi không gặp chị thường xuyên. Mỗi sáng, tôi nhìn vào ảnh khi ngồi ở bàn làm việc. Nó khiến tôi cảm thấy vui và hơi buồn cùng một lúc. Khung gỗ nhỏ, nhưng kỷ niệm thì rất lớn. Tôi luôn giữ tấm ảnh này gần bên mình.

mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'On my desk … there is a small photo'.
The text says 'I can see my sister and me'.

mcQuestions.prompt: What does the sister wear in the photo?
mcQuestions.hint: Check the colour of the dress.

mcQuestions.explanation: 'My father took this photo three years ago'.
mcQuestions.hint: Look at the past simple sentence.

mcQuestions.prompt: Why does the writer feel a little sad when looking at the photo?
options: Because the sister lives in another city.
Because the photo is in black and white.
mcQuestions.explanation: 'my sister lives in another city now. I do not see her very often.'
mcQuestions.hint: Where does the sister live now?

options: There is three photos on the desk.
There is a photo on the desk.
There are a photo on the desk.
There is photos on the desk.
mcQuestions.explanation: 'there is' matches a singular noun 'a photo'.

mcQuestions.prompt: Which word means a frame made of wood?
Which sentence uses the past simple correctly?
options: My father take this photo three years ago.
My father is taking this photo three years ago.
My father took this photo three years ago.
My father takes this photo three years ago.

mcQuestions.prompt: Which word fits: 'The sky is very ___.'
mcQuestions.explanation: 'blue' is the adjective. Adjectives do not add -s or -ing.

mcQuestions.prompt: What is the best topic sentence for this text?
options: My desk is very large and expensive.
On my desk there is a small photo in a wooden frame.
I love beaches and sunny days.
My sister and I often travel together.
mcQuestions.explanation: The topic sentence introduces the main subject — the photo on the desk.
mcQuestions.hint: The best opener names the photo and its location.

mcQuestions.prompt: Which preposition is correct: 'The sea is ___ us'?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'the sea is behind us'.
mcQuestions.hint: They face the camera, not the sea.

criticalThinkingQuestion: Why do people keep photos of family or friends on their desks at home or at work?
